scenario.send: SUBSCRIBE sips:8881100021@sbcsv.com SIP/2.0 From: <sips:8881100021@sbcsv.com>;tag=1 To: <sips:8881100021@sbcsv.com> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 SUBSCRIBE Contact: <sips:8881100021@10.133.43.151:52497;transport=tls> Max-Forwards: 70 Supported: 100rel,sdp-anat,eventlist Via: SIP/2.0/TLS [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Event: nena-ServiceState Expires: 60 Content-Length: 0
